# Add new term: sixth lumbar dorsal root ganglion (issue #3618)

## Summary

Adds a new UBERON term for the sixth lumbar dorsal root ganglion (L6 DRG) as requested in [issue #3618](https://github.com/obophenotype/uberon/issues/3618). The new term sits beneath the existing `lumbar dorsal root ganglion` (UBERON:0002836) alongside the existing L1–L5 sibling terms.

Rodents (e.g., mouse and rat) typically have six lumbar vertebrae, so an L6 DRG is anatomically standard in these model organisms and is widely referenced in the pain and somatosensory neuroscience literature. The request was reviewed by `@dosumis` (who confirmed the definition and the cited paper, PMID:18316160) before this work was started.

## Term added

```
[Term]
id: UBERON:9900000
name: sixth lumbar dorsal root ganglion
def: "The group of nerve cell bodies located on the dorsal spinal roots within the vertebral column at the level of the sixth lumbar vertebra." [PMID:18316160]
subset: defined_by_ordinal_series
subset: pheno_slim
synonym: "L6 dorsal root ganglion" EXACT []
synonym: "sixth lumbar spinal ganglion" EXACT []
is_a: UBERON:0002836 ! lumbar dorsal root ganglion
relationship: dc-contributor https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8037-076X
property_value: dcterms-date "2026-05-15T12:00:00Z" xsd:dateTime
property_value: term_tracker_item "https://github.com/obophenotype/uberon/issues/3618" xsd:anyURI
created_by: dragon-ai-agent
```

Note: `UBERON:9900000` is a temporary new-term ID (the `99xxxxx` range per `CLAUDE.md`). It will be replaced by a definitive ID by the standard allocate-definitive-ids workflow.

## Rationale / design choices

- **Parent**: The user-requested parent (`UBERON:0002836 lumbar dorsal root ganglion`) is the natural genus and is consistent with how the sibling L1–L5 DRGs (`UBERON:0002857`, `UBERON:0002856`, `UBERON:0002858`, `UBERON:0003943`, `UBERON:0002859`) are placed.
- **Definition**: Used verbatim from the issue (verified by `@dosumis`), cited to PMID:18316160. The phrasing mirrors the definitions on the L4 and L5 DRG sibling terms.
- **Synonyms**: Both synonyms requested in the issue were added as EXACT, matching the pattern on the L4/L5 sibling terms (e.g., `L5 dorsal root ganglion`, `fifth lumbar spinal ganglion`).
- **Subsets**: `defined_by_ordinal_series` (shared with all L1–L5 siblings) and `pheno_slim` (used on L4, L5, and the parent term).
- **No logical (intersection_of) definition**: The L1–L5 sibling terms have no logical definition either, only `is_a` to the parent. Adding an `extends_fibers_into` axiom would require a `root of L6 spinal nerve` term, which does not exist in this ontology; rather than create a second new term out of scope of the issue, the term is left without an `intersection_of` block, matching its siblings.
- **No xrefs**: Unlike L1–L5, the standard human-centric anatomy ontologies (FMA, BIRNLEX, EMAPA, UMLS) do not provide an L6 DRG class (humans have only 5 lumbar vertebrae and the EMAPA mouse mapping for L6 was not located). No xrefs were invented; xrefs can be added later if a curator identifies appropriate ones.
- **Provenance**: Contributor ORCID, `dcterms-date`, `term_tracker_item`, and `created_by: dragon-ai-agent` are set as required by `CLAUDE.md`.

## Checklist

- [x] Read issue #3618 and both comments from `@dosumis` confirming the request
- [x] Verified that no existing term covers "sixth lumbar dorsal root ganglion" / "L6 dorsal root ganglion" in `src/ontology/uberon-edit.obo`
- [x] Reviewed the proposed parent (UBERON:0002836) and L1–L5 sibling terms for pattern consistency
- [x] Created the new stanza in `terms/UBERON_9900000.obo` and checked it in with `obo-checkin.pl`
- [x] Confirmed the new term landed correctly in `src/ontology/uberon-edit.obo`
- [x] Provenance metadata set: ORCID contributor, dcterms-date, term_tracker_item, created_by
- [ ] `robot convert` reserialisation — skipped because `robot` is not installed in this environment; the file was modified by `obo-checkin.pl` which preserves the canonical OBO layout. Please re-run `robot convert -i src/ontology/uberon-edit.obo -f obo -o src/ontology/uberon-edit.obo` locally if needed before merge.
- [ ] PMID:18316160 full text not re-fetched (`aurelian` not available in this environment); relying on `@dosumis`'s confirmation in the issue that the paper supports the definition.

## Notes for reviewers

- If a `root of sixth lumbar spinal nerve` term is desired, that should likely be a follow-up — it would let us add a parallel `intersection_of` axiom (`extends_fibers_into …`) consistent with the parent class's logical definition.
- The temporary ID `UBERON:9900000` will be replaced by the allocate-definitive-ids workflow.

Signed: `@dragon-ai-agent`
